---
title: "Rose Arbesser"
---

## Rose Arbesser

### Description

German governess to Princess Margherita of Savoy

### Biography

Identified from the letter quoted by Coleridge, <i>Life</i>, 348-50.

### Letters

- Letter from March 28. 1865
- Letter from March 25th 1865

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
